description_long: This is a pair of rugged, brown hiking boots with a high-ankle design, constructed from a combination of leather and synthetic materials. The boots feature a standard criss-cross lacing system with metal eyelets and reinforced stitching along the seams for durability. The uppers show visible creasing and scuff marks, indicating significant use, while the soles display a deep, lugged tread pattern designed for traction on rough terrain. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the tongue is thick and integrated into the upper for added support. The outsoles are made of thick rubber, with dirt and wear evident on the tread, suggesting outdoor use. Overall, the boots have a utilitarian appearance, suitable for urban or trail environments.
description: A pair of brown, high-ankle hiking boots with criss-cross laces and lugged rubber soles, showing visible wear and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the lacing system, toe creases, and overall worn texture.
description_view_1: Rear and sole view highlighting the deep lugged tread and heel structure, with visible dirt and wear.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the padded collar, heel, and the interior tag, with the sole partially visible.
description_view_3: Side profile showing the boot's silhouette, stitching details, and scuffed leather surface.
